summary: Iteration 23 — Phase A (logout button fix + pending-approvals badge/banner) VERIFIED end-to-end for company_admin. Backend smoke 4/4 pass (test_iter23_approvals.py). Frontend: logout button not occluded by tab bar (btm=628, tab_bar_top=766), shows 'Signing out…' while in-flight and redirects back to landing. row-admin-badge shows correct pending employee count (1) on Profile; row-company-requests correctly hidden for company_admin. Home dashboard shows yellow approvals-banner with title '1 pending approval', subtitle '1 employee', and Review pill (approvals-review-btn) — banner disappears when count returns to 0. Super-admin end-to-end UI verification was NOT possible because the super_admin PIN gate blocks tab render (per iter 20/22, user has requested we do NOT reset super_admin PIN); the underlying logic is verified via (a) shared banner/badge code path exercised as company_admin and (b) backend endpoint contracts.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"'. Reference: multiple screens using shadow.card / shadow.cta (see /app/frontend/src/theme.ts).
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: likely internal RN-web layer, but worth grepping app code.

action_items: Super-admin live UI verification for the banner + row-company-requests-badge remains blocked by the intentional super_admin pin_must_change gate. If a live E2E for super_admin is desired, the user will need to complete the PIN change themselves; test agents must NOT reset it.
Consider migrating deprecated shadow.* style props to boxShadow to silence RN-web warnings on Home / Profile screens.
critical_code_review_comments: profile.tsx uses paddingBottom: 78 + insets.bottom + 40 correctly (line 120) — verified logout button is no longer occluded by the 78px tab bar.
index.tsx banner condition `(pendingEmpCount > 0 || pendingReqCount > 0)` correctly hides the banner at 0/0.
Row component in profile.tsx uses `badgeCount && badgeCount > 0` — behaves correctly for undefined/0.
approvals-review-btn correctly routes to /company-requests when pendingReqCount>0 else /admin (index.tsx:290-294).

success_rate.frontend: 100% for company_admin verified paths (super_admin path not live-verified due to PIN gate)

seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral company 'TEST_ITER23_Co' + company_admin user + 1 pending employee via direct MongoDB insert. All ephemeral data cleaned up (users_deleted=2, companies_deleted=1, sessions_deleted=2). Super_admin document untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP dev mode returns dev_code in the OTP response. Backend normalises emails to lowercase — any seeded user emails MUST be lowercase or /auth/otp/verify will create a phantom employee user. Super_admin end-to-end tab render remains blocked by pin_must_change gate; do NOT reset the super_admin PIN.
rca_of_issue: N/A — verification-only iteration. Logout occlusion fix (paddingBottom = 78 + insets.bottom + 40) verified via bounding-box measurement: button bottom at y=628 vs tab bar top at y=766 → clearly above the tab bar with ample margin.
